name: Irish Cream Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup - 1 3/4 cups Irish Whiskey (or rum, rye whiskey, bourbon, or scotch)
14 oz Eagle Brand SWEETENED CONDENSED MILK
1 pint WHIPPING CREAM or COFFEE CREAM
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender container.
2. Blend until smooth and well combined.
3. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator for up to one month.
4. Stir before serving.
